'''竏嗄-sh-b-y''' ('''kamashbeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jork|jork]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jork|jork]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-sh-b-y
|-
! Lemma
| kamashbeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimashbeyoko|thimashbeyoko]] || [[word:jimashbeyoko|jimashbeyoko]] || [[word:shimashbeyoko|shimashbeyoko]] || [[word:kimashbeyoko|kimashbeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumashbeyoko|thuthumashbeyoko]] || [[word:jujumashbeyoko|jujumashbeyoko]] || [[word:shushumashbeyoko|shushumashbeyoko]] || [[word:kukumashbeyoko|kukumashbeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumashbeyoko|thumashbeyoko]] || [[word:jumashbeyoko|jumashbeyoko]] || [[word:shumashbeyoko|shumashbeyoko]] || [[word:kumashbeyoko|kumashbeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomashbeyoko|thomashbeyoko]] || [[word:jomashbeyoko|jomashbeyoko]] || [[word:shomashbeyoko|shomashbeyoko]] || [[word:komashbeyoko|komashbeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmashbeyoko|thﾃｦmashbeyoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦmashbeyoko|jﾃｦmashbeyoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦmashbeyoko|shﾃｦmashbeyoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦmashbeyoko|kﾃｦmashbeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamashbeyoko|thamashbeyoko]] || [[word:jamashbeyoko|jamashbeyoko]] || [[word:shamashbeyoko|shamashbeyoko]] || [[word:kamashbeyoko|kamashbeyoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
